pages.title: Golf Adventure 3D
pages.description:
Navigate 3D fairways by aiming precise golf shots with spin and power control to sink each ball into increasingly challenging holes. Players adjust trajectory and timing to conquer diverse course layouts in this casual golf experience. Each level introduces varied obstacles to test shot accuracy and strategy.

Key Features

• Spin and power shot mechanics  
• Manual shot trajectory control  
• Progressive course difficulty  
• Time-based scoring system  
• 3D golf course environments

pages.title: Block Golf 2
pages.description:
Putt through block-based obstacle courses using precise aiming and angle control in this physics-driven golf game. Players navigate increasingly complex levels with geometrically shaped barriers that require careful shot planning. Timing and shot strength are key to clearing each stage and achieving the lowest strokes possible, challenging accuracy and problem-solving skills.

Key Features

• Precision angle aiming mechanic  
• Physics based ball trajectory  
• Progressive block obstacle courses  
• Stroke count challenge system  
• Minimalistic geometric visual style

pages.title: Block Golf

pages.title: Golf Solitaire: a funny card game
pages.description:
Arrange cards in descending order using a single card foundation to clear the tableau in this golf-themed solitaire variant. Players link cards either one rank higher or lower, navigating through a layered deck to uncover hidden cards and advance through progressive scoring tiers. The gameplay balances strategic card selection and timing under limited moves.

Key Features

• Rank-based card matching  
• Single card foundation play  
• Tableau clearing progression  
• Undo move system  
• Card deck golf theme

pages.title: Golf Solitaire Pro
pages.description:
Arrange cards to clear the tableau using golf solitaire rules where cards are removed by selecting those one rank higher or lower than the current card. Players rely on sequence strategy and deal management to reveal hidden cards and maximize clears in a relaxing golfing card setting. Progression is measured by completing increasingly complex card layouts under limited moves.

Key Features

• Rank-based card removal mechanic  
• Sequential card selection control  
• Increasingly complex layouts progression  
• Limited moves challenge system  
• Card game with golf-themed visuals

pages.title: Golf Solitaire
pages.description:

The game challenges players to judge power and angle carefully, adapting to each hole's layout for optimal performance. Players progress through increasingly complex levels that test accuracy and timing without any traditional storyline or setting details.

Key Features

• Stroke-based golf shot mechanic  
• Mouse and keyboard aiming controls  
• Increasing hole difficulty progression  
• Score tracking per course layout  
• Minimalist golf course visuals

pages.title: Funny Golf!
pages.description:
Aim shots across comically designed courses using a simple swing meter to gauge power and direction. Players adjust ball trajectory through timing and angle control to navigate quirky obstacles. Each hole presents a fresh layout to master precision putts and complete playthroughs with minimal strokes.

Key Features

• Swing meter shot timing  
• Angle adjustment aiming system  
• Increasing course complexity  
• Scoring based on stroke count  
• Whimsical golf course designs

pages.title: Fun Golf
pages.description:
Aim precise golf shots through miniature course obstacles and angled terrain setups in this casual golf game. Players adjust swing power and angle to navigate winding tracks and collect rewards while tackling inventive hole designs. Each level challenges shot accuracy and timing, encouraging gradual skill improvement across increasingly complex mini-golf courses.

Key Features

• Precision shot power control  
• Angled terrain navigation  
• Progressive hole difficulty  
• Collectible scoring targets  
• Miniature course environments

pages.title: Foxy Golf Royale
pages.description:
Swing precise shots to outlast opponents in a last-player-standing golf challenge. Players navigate a shrinking play area, adjusting power and angle to land the ball on tricky greens while avoiding hazards. Strategic aiming and timing determine success in this compact, royale-inspired setting where each round increases pressure.

Key Features

• Power and angle shot controls  
• Shrinking golf course arena  
• Last-player-standing elimination  
• Dynamic hazard placement  
• Casual multiplayer matches

pages.title: Flick Golf Star
pages.description:
Flick precise golf shots across dynamic courses by swiping to control angle and power in this physics-driven mini golf game. Navigate tricky obstacles and chain trick shots to rack up combo points. Unlock new courses with varied hole layouts that test your timing and accuracy for high scores.

Key Features

• Swipe based shot control  
• Combo scoring system  
• Unlockable golf courses  
• Obstacle navigation mechanics  
• Physics influenced ball trajectory

pages.title: Fabby Golf!
pages.description:
Swings target tricky hole layouts using precise timing and shot power control in a colorful miniature course environment. Players navigate through increasingly complex green designs, balancing shot angle and stroke strength to sink the ball efficiently. Unique physics for each course element challenge players to master diverse wind and terrain conditions.  

Key Features

• Timing-based shot power meter  
• Angle adjustment aiming system  
• Progressive course difficulty levels  
• Wind and terrain physics effects  
• Bright miniature golf course design

pages.title: Extreme Golf 2d
pages.description:
Launch golf balls through challenging 2D courses using precise timing and aiming mechanics aimed at navigating tricky obstacles. Players must adjust shot power and angle carefully to land the ball in each hole while contending with varied terrain layouts. Progression unfolds as stages increase in difficulty, testing accuracy and strategic shot planning in a casual golf setting.

Key Features

• Precision shot timing control  
• Angle adjustment aiming system  
• Increasing course complexity  
• Score-based stage progression  
• Cartoon style golf environments

pages.title: Extreme Golf
pages.description:
Launch golf balls through challenging obstacle courses using precise aiming and timing in this fast-paced mini golf experience. Players adjust shot power and angle to navigate complex ramps and hazards, aiming to sink the ball in as few strokes as possible. Levels increase in difficulty with dynamic obstacles that test player precision and strategy.

Key Features

• Precision shot aiming system  
• Power-based swing control

• Stroke count challenge progression

pages.title: Endless Golf
pages.description:
Chip shots across endless fairways aiming for continuous hole completion in a minimalist golf challenge. Players fine-tune their swing strength and angle to navigate varying terrain with increasing difficulty. The game tests precision and timing as golfers attempt to improve scores through successive courses that expand indefinitely.

Key Features

• Angle and power shot control  
• Procedurally generated course layout  
• Precision-based hole completion  
• Incremental difficulty progression  
• Minimalist golf environment

pages.title: Disc Golf Game
pages.description:
Throw precise discs through varied course layouts in this casual golf game centered on accuracy and timing. Players navigate different hole designs using flick or drag controls to manage disc speed and angle. The main challenge lies in completing each hole in as few throws as possible, making skillful shot placement essential.

Key Features

• Flick-based disc throwing mechanic  
• Angle and power shot control  
• Progressive course difficulty levels  
• Time or stroke-based scoring system  
• Outdoor park and forest settings

pages.title: Dig Out Miner Golf
pages.description:
Drive a golf ball through twisting underground tunnels by aiming shots carefully in this physics-based digging challenge. Players control shot power and angle to carve paths and reach tricky holes, navigating soil and rock obstacles along the way. Each level tests precision and strategic planning to complete increasingly complex subterranean courses.

Key Features

• Physics-driven shot mechanics  
• Shot power and angle control  
• Underground tunnel level design  
• Increasing environmental obstacles  
• Precision aiming gameplay

pages.title: Crazy golf III
pages.description:
Shoot precise strokes across challenging miniature courses in this arcade-style golf game, adjusting power and angle to navigate complex obstacles and narrow paths. Players aim to sink the ball in as few hits as possible while mastering irregular terrain layouts and dynamic level designs. Progressive layouts challenge shot precision and offer varied table obstacles for casual players and teens alike.

Scoring depends on minimal strokes, encouraging strategic shot planning on each mixed-surface level.
